# Paths synced from the template into downstream instances by
# .github/workflows/sync-template.yml. One path per line. Directories
# sync recursively. Comment lines and blank lines are ignored.
#
# When you add a new file/dir that should ship to every fork (a new
# script, a new prompts subdir, a new workflow), add its path here.
# SYNC.md must stay accurate about this list - see the skill file for
# the update rule.
scripts/
prompts/
templates/
references/
.github/workflows/
.github/template-sync-paths.txt
.gitignore
README.md
SETUP.md
SYNC.md
